query:
INSERT INTO courts (name, sport, description, weekdayPrice, weekendPrice, openTime, closeTime, slotDurationMinutes, isActive, amenities) VALUES
('Cricket Turf', 'cricket', 'Premium cricket turf with professional-grade nets and floodlights. Perfect for practice sessions and friendly matches.', 1800, 2000, '06:00', '23:00', 60, true, '["Parking", "Drinking Water", "First Aid", "Flood Lights", "Changing Room", "Washroom"]'),
('Football Turf', 'football', 'Multi-purpose football turf supporting 5-a-side and 7-a-side formats. Artificial grass with professional markings.', 1800, 2000, '06:00', '23:00', 60, true, '["Parking", "Drinking Water", "Flood Lights", "Changing Room", "Washroom"]'),
('Badminton Court 1', 'badminton', 'Indoor badminton court at Home Shuttlers Academy. 4th Floor, Thakur Shyamnarayan School. Professional coaching available.', 400, 500, '06:00', '22:30', 60, true, '["Indoor Court", "Professional Nets", "Good Lighting", "Changing Room"]'),
('Badminton Court 2', 'badminton', 'Indoor badminton court at Home Shuttlers Academy. Ideal for practice and competitive play.', 400, 500, '06:00', '22:30', 60, true, '["Indoor Court", "Professional Nets", "Good Lighting", "Changing Room"]'),
('Box Cricket Arena', 'box_cricket', 'Enclosed box cricket arena with nets. Great for quick matches and corporate events.', 1500, 1800, '06:00', '23:00', 60, true, '["Enclosed Arena", "Flood Lights", "Parking", "Drinking Water"]');
